stages.name: expectTrue
stages.message: The MTU of the test system must be 1500 +1 Byte.

stages.name: [TEST STEP 1]
stages.message: The test system sends an ICMPv6 echo request to the DUT with any user data and a payload length of (1500 - 8 - 40).

stages.name: expectTrue
stages.message: The test system must receive an ICMPv6 echo reply message from the DUT within 100.0 ms. The payload must be the same and the CRC must be correct.
summary: expectTrue fails, Severity.Severity.MAJOR "The test system must receive an ICMPv6 echo reply message from the DUT within 100.0 ms. The payload must be the same and the CRC must be correct. "
stages.actual_result: An ICMPv6 Echo Reply message is received: True
stages.expected_result: An ICMPv6 Echo Reply message is received: True

stages.name: [TEST STEP 2]
stages.message: The test system sends an ICMPv6 echo request to the DUT with any user data and a payload length of (1500 - 8 - 40 + 1).

stages.name: expectTrue
stages.message: The test system must receive an ICMPv6 echo reply message from the DUT within 100.0 ms. The payload must be the same and the CRC must be correct.
stages.actual_result: An ICMPv6 Echo Reply message is not received: False
stages.expected_result: An ICMPv6 Echo Reply message is not received: True

metadata.description: The test case consists of two parts. Verification: The test system sends a packet with the maximum allowed packet size and checks the proper reception. Falsification: The test system sends a packet that exceeds the maximum allowed size by one byte. The DUT must discard the packet and signal the error.

metadata.description: This test checks if the frames transmitted and forwarded by an ECU that contains a switch are at least 64 bytes. The frames should not be transmitted to internal ports, i.e., internal partitions of DUT.

parameters.switch_type: Das DUT hat einen internen Switch und der Switch selbst ist gPTP Slave am Host Prozessor oder einem weiteren Switch
